introSection: Spinning Coaster was a steel spinning roller coaster owned by Butler Amusements. It was introduced in 2015. It was written off following a fire in 2018 and subsequently sold to an unknown party.
fullText: Spinning Coaster was a steel spinning roller coaster owned by Butler Amusements. It was introduced in 2015. It was written off following a fire in 2018 and subsequently sold to an unknown party.
